title: Amtech S6460 Storage Box, Screw Box Organiser for Hardware Assortment, 23 Compartments with Removable Dividers
features: DURABLE: 380mm x 310mm x 60mm in size, this versatile storage box organiser is made from tough plastic for durability
VERSATILE: With a handy carry handle, removable dividers and 23 storage compartments, it is ideal for storing and organising hardware
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description This Amtech storage solution makes for a perfect gift for DIY enthusiasts and Craft enthusiasts. Amtech has a fantastic range of DIY, as well as Hobby and Craft tools that will meet all your essential requirements. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Storage box organiser See more
